name: sap-mcp-server
description: Independent open-source MCP server for SAP (ABAP / BTP) via a backend relay

scripts.build:bin:linux: npm run bundle && npm run build:sea && cp "$(command -v node)" build/sap-mcp-server-linux && npx postject build/sap-mcp-server-linux NODE_SEA_BLOB build/sea.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 && chmod +x build/sap-mcp-server-linux
